item.title: Heavy Trailer Sinks Through Asphalt
item.description: A heavy trailer presses into soft asphalt, creating a tricky recovery scenario. Conditions like this require planning and precision. How would you handle it?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Trailer Sinks Through Asphalt
media:content.media:description: A heavy trailer presses into soft asphalt, creating a tricky recovery scenario. Conditions like this require planning and precision. How would you handle it?

item.title: Trusting the Pick & Pull
item.description: A recovery situation that depends on the right tools and careful judgment. Knowing when to rely on equipment is essential. Would you take the risk?

media:content.media:title: Trusting the Pick & Pull
media:content.media:description: A recovery situation that depends on the right tools and careful judgment. Knowing when to rely on equipment is essential. Would you take the risk?

item.title: Truck stuck in gravel recovery
item.description: A heavy vehicle gets trapped in loose gravel, requiring careful recovery planning and equipment. What’s the safest way to get it moving again?

media:content.media:title: Truck stuck in gravel recovery
media:content.media:description: A heavy vehicle gets trapped in loose gravel, requiring careful recovery planning and equipment. What’s the safest way to get it moving again?

item.title: Flatbed Load Challenges
item.description: A look at the challenges of securing and transporting loads on a flatbed trailer. Proper balance and planning are key. What’s the most difficult part of load handling?

media:content.media:title: Flatbed Load Challenges
media:content.media:description: A look at the challenges of securing and transporting loads on a flatbed trailer. Proper balance and planning are key. What’s the most difficult part of load handling?

item.title: Just Let Me Pull
item.description: A straightforward recovery approach puts power and precision to work. When does pulling alone get the job done?

media:content.media:title: Just Let Me Pull
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recovery approach puts power and precision to work. When does pulling alone get the job done?

item.title: Handling One Heavy Load
item.description: A look at transporting an oversized load, focusing on planning, balance, and safety throughout the move. What’s the biggest challenge in jobs like this?

media:content.media:title: Handling One Heavy Load
media:content.media:description: A look at transporting an oversized load, focusing on planning, balance, and safety throughout the move. What’s the biggest challenge in jobs like this?

item.title: Super Load Stuck on the Route
item.description: A complex transport job involving a large and heavy load that requires precision and planning. What’s the biggest challenge in super load moves?

media:content.media:title: Super Load Stuck on the Route
media:content.media:description: A complex transport job involving a large and heavy load that requires precision and planning. What’s the biggest challenge in super load moves?

item.title: This isn’t going to be hard… or is it?
item.description: A recovery that looks simple at first glance quickly becomes more complex than expected. What challenges appear once work begins?

media:content.media:title: This isn’t going to be hard… or is it?
media:content.media:description: A recovery that looks simple at first glance quickly becomes more complex than expected. What challenges appear once work begins?

item.title: Tying It Up Safely
item.description: A focus on properly tying down and securing equipment for transport. Why is load security so important in heavy hauling?

media:content.media:title: Tying It Up Safely
media:content.media:description: A focus on properly tying down and securing equipment for transport. Why is load security so important in heavy hauling?

item.title: Another Mississippi River Mishap
item.description: A recovery operation near the Mississippi River requiring careful coordination and planning. What makes river-area recoveries more challenging?

media:content.media:title: Another Mississippi River Mishap
media:content.media:description: A recovery operation near the Mississippi River requiring careful coordination and planning. What makes river-area recoveries more challenging?

item.title: Guiding a Navigator back to safety
item.description: A stuck vehicle is carefully recovered and guided back to stable ground. How do operators maintain control during recovery?

media:content.media:title: Guiding a Navigator back to safety
media:content.media:description: A stuck vehicle is carefully recovered and guided back to stable ground. How do operators maintain control during recovery?

item.title: Old School Meets New School
item.description: A towing and recovery job combining traditional methods with modern equipment. How do different techniques work together on complex jobs?

media:content.media:title: Old School Meets New School
media:content.media:description: A towing and recovery job combining traditional methods with modern equipment. How do different techniques work together on complex jobs?
